heading: Authority to seize property subject to forfeiture
label: 7321 Authority to seize property subject to forfeiture
text: Any property subject to forfeiture to the United States under any provision of this title may be seized by the Secretary.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
